heading: Review and report by Comptroller General
label: 9594 Review and report by Comptroller General

children.text: conduct a thorough review of the programs carried out under this chapter; and

children.label: A
children.text: an evaluation of the effectiveness of the programs in achieving the purposes of this chapter;

children.label: B
children.text: a description of any failure by any recipient of assistance under this chapter to comply with the requirements under this chapter; and

children.label: C
children.text: recommendations for any legislative or administrative action that should be taken to improve the achievement of the purposes of this chapter.
